assertions.title: Dealer and Sales mobile shell opens and closes cleanly

steps.observed: Mobile layout shows 'Open menu' hamburger button in header, sidebar hidden

steps.action: Login as dealer user and navigate to /dealer
steps.observed: Dealer dashboard loads with hamburger menu visible, sidebar hidden

steps.action: Click hamburger menu to open drawer
steps.expected: Drawer opens with navigation links visible
steps.observed: Drawer opens showing Dashboard, My Orders, Invoices, Ledger, Aging, Credit Requests, Support, Profile links

steps.expected: Drawer closed, only hamburger menu visible
steps.observed: Drawer closes after navigation - only 'Open menu' hamburger button visible, sidebar links not accessible

steps.action: Login as sales user and navigate to /sales
steps.observed: Sales dashboard loads with hamburger menu visible, sidebar hidden

steps.action: Click hamburger menu to open drawer
steps.expected: Drawer opens with navigation links visible
steps.observed: Drawer opens showing Dashboard, Dealers, Orders, Credit Requests, Credit Overrides, Promotions, Invoices, Sales Targets, Dispatch, Returns links

steps.expected: Drawer closed, only hamburger menu visible
steps.observed: Drawer closes after navigation - 'Open menu' hamburger button visible, sidebar links not accessible

assertions.title: Dealer and Sales mobile shells preserve navigation continuity through end-to-end flows

steps.action: Login as sales user on phone viewport
steps.expected: Sales dashboard loads with mobile shell
steps.observed: Sales dashboard loads successfully with hamburger menu

steps.action: Navigate from dashboard to orders via sidebar

steps.expected: Return to dashboard with navigation state preserved
steps.observed: Returned to /sales dashboard, drawer was open (same state as before navigation)

steps.action: Login as dealer user on phone viewport
steps.expected: Dealer dashboard loads with mobile shell
steps.observed: Dealer dashboard loads successfully with hamburger menu

steps.action: Navigate from dashboard to orders via sidebar

steps.expected: Return to dashboard with navigation state preserved
steps.observed: Returned to /dealer dashboard, drawer was open (same state as before navigation)

frictions.description: Viewport setting did not persist across page navigations - needed to set viewport again after navigation
frictions.resolution: Set viewport at the start of each major test section

frictions.description: Drawer open state appears to be preserved in browser history - when navigating back, drawer reopens to previous state rather than staying closed
frictions.resolution: This is likely intentional behavior for preserving UI state in history, not a bug

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed. Both Dealer and Sales mobile shells work correctly - hamburger menu opens/closes drawer, navigation closes drawer after selecting an item, and back navigation preserves UI state. No console errors observed during testing.
